Sport|Olympics

Jack Laugherand some of hisTeam GBdiving teammates have set upOnlyFansaccounts to help fund theirParis Olympics ambitions.

Laugher and other divers deemed with podium potential for theParis Olympicsget funding of £28,000 a year.

But the 29-year-old admitted he had turned to OnlyFans to supplement his income. Subscription to his page costs $10 (£7.77) per month with an annual subscription at a reduced rate of £80.

Laugher, who insists there are no nude pictures, also said other members of the team had also followed suit, including Noah Williams, who willpartner Tom Daleyin the 10metre platform synchro diving competition.

He said: “I try and make extra money. I’ve got something people want and I’ll happily cash in on that. I’m a bit of a hustler and I want a bit more money if I can.

“I was the first person to do it in our team. Dad was saying to me, ‘you put stuff on Instagram for free but when the product is free, like Instagram is, you are the product.

“So now I’m giving people stuff which is very similar to what I post online but it’s for a small subscription fee.”

title: Team GB Olympic diver Jack Laugher explains why he's set-up OnlyFans page | The Standard
author: Matt Majendie
description: Laugher and other divers deemed with podium potential get £28k-per-week in funding
keywords: Paris Olympics, Jack Laugher, Team GB, OnlyFans, Paris, Tom Daley
